no: pre SCS components from Butchery and MiH E&Q - Technically before SCS, but should prob be fine between Quests/NPCs and items? so that item and spell mods can account for their additions BuTcHeRy - New encounters.. Local fix applied: ALWAYS block guard changed from shared bg2_chapter to mod-specific d9_butchery_always

in.t: Edit butchery/lib/always.tph line 13, change bg2_chapter to d9_butchery_always (shared guard variable causes ALWAYS block skip). Or use eet-mod-forge-patches #14.

conflicts.reason: cn:30 spawns wraith Angelo (d9angelo.cre, DV=D9ANGELO) as enemy in Abyss battle. Content-incompatible with Angelo as joinable NPC. tp2 has REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT MOD_IS_INSTALLED ~setup-angelo.tp2~ — auto-blocked when Angelo NPC present. Different DVs so no technical breakage, but thematically wrong.
conflicts.myComps: #30 Revisited fight against Wraith Sarevok in the Abyss
conflicts.source: tp2 line 125 REQUIRE_PREDICATE; d9angelo.cre DV=D9ANGELO vs adangel.cre DV=adangel (no collision), 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Both add creatures to ar5203. Butchery adds 15 scripted spawns (hardest), MiH EQ adds 20 static creatures, and Ascension cn:1500 raises EXTRACOUNT to 60 with ~16 dynamic spawns. Combined total ~51 creatures in a 35-creature area — severe overcrowding, pathfinding issues, lag. Resolution: keep MiH EQ cn:46 (diverse static placement) + Ascension (dynamic scaling), removed Butchery cn:51 .
conflicts.source: Butchery d9yanew.baf spawns 5+5+5; MiH expand_yagas_army.tpa places 20 actors; Ascension yagashura.tpa EXTRACOUNT 35→60, 2026-04

dependencies.reason: Component 51 enhanced by Ascension — patches Ascension spawn blocks if present, works without
Component 51 enhanced by SCS AI — patches SCS creature blocks if present, works without

sum: Adds 9 optional tough combat encounters throughout BG2 areas. Each is a standalone fight you can enable or disable independently.
